ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding flight test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight test */,
  "flight_condition" TEXT /* Type of flight condition (e.g., subsonic, supersonic) */,
  "dataset_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "measurement_interval" REAL /* Time interval between measurements */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensors used */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES flight_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight test */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the flight test was conducted */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the flight test (e.g., testing, training) */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight test in hours */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the test (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tests_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft (e.g., fighter, transport) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the aircraft */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the aircraft (e.g., NASA, Air Force) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during the test (in atm) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the test (in percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the test (in m/s) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction during the test (in degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the measurement belongs to */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value related to the measurement */,
  "mach_number" REAL /* Mach number during the measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure measured (in atm) */,
  "rad_temp" REAL /* Radiative temperature */,
  "rho" REAL /* Density of the fluid */,
  "rhoE" REAL /* Specific internal energy density */,
  "rhou" REAL /* Momentum density */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the measurement point */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., m, kg, s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "global_node_id" INTEGER /* Global identifier for the node */,
  "pedigree_node_id" INTEGER /* Pedigree identifier for the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement it belongs to */,
  "point_index" INTEGER /* Index of the point in the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the point */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Results or findings from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, research) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the dataset was accessed (e.g., office, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of flying experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., aerodynamics, thermodynamics) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in data analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
